title: Fix the Cascading Multi-File Failure
description: A signature change added a dry_run parameter, breaking call sites, mocks, and integration assertions across 4 files.
pr_diff:
PR Diff:
  - def process_event(event: Event) -> Result:
  + def process_event(event: Event, dry_run: bool = False) -> Result:
  +     if dry_run:
  +         return Result(success=True, changes=[])

CI Log:
  mypy src/processor.py ... FAILED
    error: Argument missing for parameter "dry_run" [call-arg] (x3)
  pytest tests/test_processor.py ... FAILED
    TypeError: process_event() mock doesn't match new signature
  pytest tests/test_integration.py ... FAILED
    AssertionError: expected Result with changes, got empty Result
initial_ci_output:
[FAILED] mypy
error: Argument missing for parameter "dry_run" [call-arg] (x3)

[FAILED] unit_tests
TypeError: process_event() mock doesn't match new signature

[FAILED] integration
AssertionError: expected Result with changes, got empty Result

[FAILED] full_suite
Multiple cascading failures across 4 files

files.tests/test_processor.py:
from unittest.mock import MagicMock
from src.processor import Event, Result, process_event


def test_process_event_returns_result():
    event = Event(event_type="click", payload={"page": "home"})
    result = process_event(event)
    assert result.success is True


def test_process_event_mock():
    mock_process_event = MagicMock()
    mock_process_event.side_effect = lambda event: Result(success=True, changes=["updated"])
    result = mock_process_event(Event(event_type="click", payload={}))
    assert result.changes == ["updated"]
files.tests/test_integration.py:
from src.processor import Event, process_event


def test_integration_changes_applied():
    event = Event(event_type="deploy", payload={"version": "2.1"})
    result = process_event(event)
    assert result.changes == ["updated"]
    assert result.success is True
